api_key.description: OnceHub API key. Sent as the API-Key header; never logged.

base_url.description: OnceHub API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only bookings with a last_updated_time at or after this time are read.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
